sub: Canonical prompt templates — shared across agents via dropdown. Edit once, propagate to every agent that uses it.
empty: No templates yet. Click "+ New Template" to start.
restart_note: Daemon restart required to apply to running agents.
tip_edit: Open the editor to modify this template's content. The name is locked; only content is editable.
tip_delete: Delete this template. If still in use, a confirmation appears; force clears the FK on affected agents.
name_tip: Unique name (lowercase, dash/underscore, 2–64 chars). Cannot be changed after creation.
content_tip: Full system prompt used by AI agents. Read as the system prompt at the start of every session.
del_warn_c: agents. Deleting with force=true clears the reference from their agents.
